subject: Remove all http nodeports from DCAE-DS
commit_message:
Remove all http nodeports from DCAE-DS

Issue-ID: OOM-2347
Signed-off-by: Fuss, Areli (af732p) <areli.fuss@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: I7977425c72bb4d1bc75b2781e38ccc9c254fff4c
